=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/multipleEffectProvide_preview.ts(11,41): warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)


==== /.src/multipleEffectProvide_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics multipleEffectProvide:warning
    import { Effect, Layer, ServiceMap } from "effect"
    
    class A extends ServiceMap.Service<A>()("A", { make: Effect.succeed({}) }) {
      static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
    }
    class B extends ServiceMap.Service<B>()("B", { make: Effect.succeed({}) }) {
      static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
    }
    export const preview = Effect.void.pipe(Effect.provide(A.Default), Effect.provide(B.Default))
                                            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377033: Avoid chaining Effect.provide calls, as this can lead to service lifecycle issues. Instead, merge layers and provide them in a single call. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
